executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green. External owner loop remains blocked on marketing outcome evidence (Codeberg-primary adoption measurement-pending).
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: External owner loop must produce measurable primary-repo adoption evidence and pass marketing independent verification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct script execution (checker + independent verifier + verifier trio)

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification fails closed — Codeberg-primary adoption measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: External owner loop has not produced fresh measurable outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption.
findings.recommended_fix: External owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence.

findings.title: All architecture-owned gates pass cleanly this cycle (confirmed by trio)
findings.mechanism: Checker (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK) -> Independent verifier (ok=true, qualified_pass=true) -> Verifier (ok=true, 0 errors).
findings.root_cause: Architecture side is coherent; no self-inflicted blockers.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain the trio as freshness gate on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Two self-inflicted defects repaired this run
findings.mechanism: Checker flagged missing ordered_fix_plan; independent verifier rejected moderate_risk as invalid health. Both repaired.
findings.root_cause: ordered_fix_plan was not persisted in prior save; independent_verify.py did not include moderate_risk in accepted health states.
findings.recommended_fix: Fixed. Both repairs applied and verified this run.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: All 23 live jobs now show empty lastError. Previous run had 8 jobs with error residue (apollo-channel-monitor, blocked-channel-recovery, competitor-analysis, content-poster, marketing-active-loop, marketing-churn-watchdog, marketing-research-daily, ralph-site-owner-loop). Gateway restart or self-healing cleared the residue.
Ran fresh independent verifier - ok=true, qualified_pass=true.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, all 23 jobs show empty lastError (cleared from 8 prior), and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification fail-closed on outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned gates all pass. Remaining red is external: marketing loop must produce measurable Codeberg-primary adoption evidence.

notes: Architecture green = checker/verifier/independent-verifier trio all pass this cycle.
All 23 live jobs show empty lastError — cleared from 8 jobs with residue in previous run.
Docs verifier: independently verified pass (consecutive passes since last fail: 25).
External marketing evidence is stale; external blocker, not architecture.

ordered_fix_plan.title: Maintain checker/verifier/independent-verifier freshness trio
ordered_fix_plan.why: Architecture side is coherent; no self-inflicted blockers.

ordered_fix_plan.title: External owner loop must produce measurable Codeberg-primary adoption evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why: Marketing independent verification fails closed on outcome evidence measurement.
